'''Nisotsa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived in the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Nisotsa attended a gathering called by [[Darth Malak|Malak]], around the time [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] decided to involve the Order in the Mandalorian Wars (circa [[3963 BBY]]), in the presence of [[Meetra Surik]] and [[Bastila Shan]], and fellow comrades [[Cariaga Sin]], [[Xaset Terep]], and [[Talvon Esan]].

Torn between remaining with the Jedi Order that chose inaction while countless innocents were slaughtered and the Republic's desperate plea for aid, Nisotsa ended up casting her lot in with the rogue Knights, going against the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council's]] wishes, and by doing so, helped to split the Jedi Order in two.

In [[3951 BBY]], Nisotsa would appear to Meetra in a vision Meetra experienced in the [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh]]. In the vision, she wielded a yellow [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the video game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the player is able to choose her appearance as that of the [[Meetra Surik|Exile]]. Thus the game will automatically replace Nisotsa with a different possible player avatar.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Vision|[[Meetra Surik]]}}
